reviews.comment:
Predio contiguo,  descuidado. La estación de servicio,  bien. Baños limpios,  se demora en comprar,  los empleados no dan más,  refuercen en temporada

(Translated by Google)
Adjacent property, neglected. The gas station itself is fine. Clean restrooms, but service is slow, the staff is overwhelmed, they need extra help during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeE1iVHVnRRAB
